items.title: Pound-breach Act 1843 (repealed 5.11.1993)
items.description: An Act to amend the Law relating to Pound-breach and Rescue in certain Cases.

items.title: Chelsea Hospital Act 1843
items.description: An Act to enable the Commissioners of Chelsea Hospital to purchase certain Parcels of Land for the Benefit of the said Hospital, and for other Purposes.

items.title: New Parishes Act 1843
items.description: An Act to make better Provision for the Spiritual Care of populous Parishes.

items.title: Judicial Committee Act 1843
items.description: An Act to make further Regulations for facilitating the hearing Appeals and other Matters by the Judicial Committee of the Privy Council.

items.title: Hosiery Act 1843 (repealed 5.11.1993)
items.description: An Act to amend the Laws for the Prevention of Frauds and Abuses by Persons employed in the Woollen, Worsted, Linen, Cotton, Flax, Mohair, and Silk Hosiery Manufactures ; and for the further securing the Property of the Manufacturers and the Wages of the Workmen engaged therein.

items.title: London Hackney Carriages Act 1843
items.description: An Act for regulating Hackney and Stage Carriages in and near London.

items.title: Public Notaries Act 1843
items.description: An Act for removing Doubts as to the Service of Clerks or Apprentices to Public Notaries, and for amending the Laws regulating the Admission of Public Notaries.

items.title: Libel Act 1843
items.description: An Act to amend the Law respecting defamatory Words and Libel.

items.title: Slave Trade Act 1843
items.description: An Act for the more effectual Suppression of the Slave Trade.
